findings.description: Section s1 contains raw RST `:download:` markup verbatim (e.g., `:download:\`W11AC0201.jsp<./_source/download/W11AC0201.jsp>\``). This RST-specific syntax will appear literally as text in a knowledge file and is not meaningful to AI consumers. File names are still readable but the markup is noise.
findings.source_evidence: Source table in 作成内容: `:download:\`W11AC0201.jsp<./_source/download/W11AC0201.jsp>\`` and `:download:\`W11AC0202.jsp<./_source/download/W11AC0202.jsp>\``

findings.description: Section s2 hints are missing 'name属性' and 'プレフィックス', both of which are key terms used in the implementation instruction for windowScopePrefixes: the developer must specify in windowScopePrefixes the prefix that was specified in the name attribute of the input item's custom tag.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 'n:formタグのwindowScopePrefixes属性に入力項目のカスタムタグのname属性に指定したプレフィックス…を指定する。'
